title: The Catholic Sun
content:
Wherever the Catholic sun doth shine,
    There�s always laughter and good red wine.
    At least I�ve always found it so.
    Benedicamus Domino!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Hilaire Belloc, titled "The Catholic Sun", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
